nasb.text: He made chains in the inner sanctuary and placed them on the tops of the pillars; and he made one hundred pomegranates and placed them on the chains.

esv.text: He made chains like a necklace and put them on the tops of the pillars, and he made a hundred pomegranates and put them on the chains.

cnv.text: 又做了像項鍊的鍊子，安放在柱頭上；又做了石榴一百個，安放在鍊子上。

ccb.text: 他也造了链子，装饰在柱冠上。他又造了一百个石榴，安在链子上。
